desc.edit: Change capacity, cuisine or description. Panel metrics recalculate on save.
desc.setup: These details build your custom dashboard: table management, reservations and metrics — all based on your restaurant.

favorites.loginPrompt: Log in to see your favourites.
favorites.empty: You haven't saved any restaurants yet.

contact.title: Write to us
contact.desc: We reply within 24h on working days.

faq.q: How do I make a reservation?
faq.a: Search for a restaurant, choose date, time and number of guests, then press "Confirm booking". You'll get instant confirmation.
Yes. Go to "My Bookings" and press cancel on the relevant reservation. Cancellations less than 4h before may carry a fee.

faq.q: How does the floor plan work?
faq.a: From the restaurant page you can open the interactive 3D floor plan. Brown tables are available; grey ones are taken. Click to select.

faq.q: What is the AI chat for?
faq.a: The AI assistant helps you find restaurants based on mood, cuisine, budget or location. Just write naturally.

faq.q: How do I enable Google sign-in?
faq.a: The Google button appears in the login modal when the admin has configured the integration. Otherwise use email and password.
Yes, after having a reservation at the restaurant. Go to the restaurant page → Reviews tab → write your rating.

header.searchPlaceholder: Ask AI: 'Find a romantic Italian spot...'

hero.title: Table Booking & Food Pre-ordering
hero.subtitle: Skip the wait. Reserve your table or order ahead for a seamless dining experience.

typewriter.line3: not just the one you booked.

hero.editorialParagraph: Independent kitchens, chefs with soul, historic neighbourhoods. Book in two taps and arrive straight for the after-meal talk.

home.topRatedSubtitle: Highly reviewed restaurants with immediate availability.
home.noResults: No restaurants found. Try a different search.

manifesto.quotePre: We believe a great table starts
manifesto.quoteMid: you walk through the door — with the anticipation, the promise, the
manifesto.author: The ReserVia editorial team

business.desc: Real-time table plan, waiting list, automatic reminders, optional pre-payment, cover analytics. All in a panel that learns from your service.

discover.title: Discover
discover.desc: Ask the AI about a vibe, not a name. We suggest tables with editorial criteria.

book.title: Book
book.desc: Two taps and confirmed. No forms, no calls, no friction.

enjoy.title: Enjoy
enjoy.desc: You arrive, you sit, you eat. If there are changes, we'll tell you. If not, silence — as it should be.

restaurant.noCharges: No charges yet. You'll only pay at the restaurant.

descriptions.The Golden Fork: Authentic flavors of Italy in the heart of the city. Our chef uses only the freshest ingredients to create traditional pastas and wood-fired pizzas.
descriptions.Sakura Gardens: An authentic Japanese experience in Granada. Fresh sushi, sashimi, and traditional dishes prepared by our master chef from Osaka.
descriptions.Prime Cuts: The finest cuts in Granada, aged to perfection. Our dry-aged beef comes from sustainable farms and is cooked exactly to your liking.
descriptions.El Centro Fusion: Where East meets West. Creative fusion cuisine combining Mediterranean and Asian influences in an exceptional setting in the heart of Granada.
descriptions.Green Leaf: Award-winning vegetarian and vegan restaurant. Farm-to-table philosophy with daily deliveries of organic, seasonal produce from local farmers.
descriptions.Petit Paris Bistro: A slice of Paris in the heart of Granada. Classic French bistro cuisine with an extensive wine list and the warmth of a Parisian neighborhood spot.
